'''gamodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svc|svc]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svc|svc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gamodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæmedheth|gæmedheth]] || [[word:gæmedhej|gæmedhej]] || [[word:gæmedhesh|gæmedhesh]] || [[word:gæmedhe|gæmedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamomodhoth|gamomodhoth]] || [[word:gamomodhoj|gamomodhoj]] || [[word:gamomodhosh|gamomodhosh]] || [[word:gamomodho|gamomodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamodhoth|gamodhoth]] || [[word:gamodhoj|gamodhoj]] || [[word:gamodhosh|gamodhosh]] || [[word:gamodho|gamodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamofdhoth|gamofdhoth]] || [[word:gamofdhoj|gamofdhoj]] || [[word:gamofdhosh|gamofdhosh]] || [[word:gamofdhof|gamofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gamodhotho|gamodhotho]] || [[word:gamodhojo|gamodhojo]] || [[word:gamodhosho|gamodhosho]] || [[word:gamodhoko|gamodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gamodhoth|gamodhoth]] || [[word:gamodhoj|gamodhoj]] || [[word:gamodhosh|gamodhosh]] || [[word:gamodho|gamodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gamodhothol|gamodhothol]] || [[word:gamodhojol|gamodhojol]] || [[word:gamodhoshol|gamodhoshol]] || [[word:gamodhokol|gamodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gamodhothotho|gamodhothotho]] || [[word:gamodhojojo|gamodhojojo]] || [[word:gamodhoshosho|gamodhoshosho]] || [[word:gamodhoko|gamodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gamodhothon|gamodhothon]] || [[word:gamodhojon|gamodhojon]] || [[word:gamodhoshon|gamodhoshon]] || [[word:gamodhokon|gamodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gamodhothoro|gamodhothoro]] || [[word:gamodhojoro|gamodhojoro]] || [[word:gamodhoshoro|gamodhoshoro]] || [[word:gamodhokoro|gamodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
